title: ardisia ruficarpa
intro: Ardisia ruficarpa, also known as Red Baeje or Red Stemmed Ardisia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. This plant is a shrub or small tree that is native to the tropical regions of Asia, and it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ardisia ruficarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Ardisia ruficarpa is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
